calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Apr-14-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Defendant/judgment debtor KIMBERLY DUNFEE in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

PLAINTIFF ABSOLUTE RESOLUTIONS INVESTMENTS, LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

The Court notes that Ms. Dunfee did not properly contest the Court's tentative ruling.

The Court discusses the matter with Ms. Dunfee.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's claim of exemption is granted in part. The Sheriff shall remit the $1,258.38 or other funds he/she is holding to the judgment creditor. In addition, the judgment debtor shall remit $350 per pay period ($700/month) to service the debt.

Order signed. Copies of the signed order are mailed to parties and to the Sacramento County Sheriff's Department.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-14-2021 Off Calendar
